records.ety: [OE. vardingale, fardingale, fr. OF. vertugale, verdugade, F. vertugade, vertugadin, from Sp. verdugado, being named from its hoops, fr. verdugo a young shoot of tree, fr. verde green, fr. L. viridis. See Verdant.]

defs: A hoop skirt or hoop petticoat, or other light, elastic material, used to extend the petticoat.
quotes: We'll revel it as bravely as the best, . . . With ruffs and cuffs, and farthingales and things.
